steps.t: Horses can be found in Lang Rhuven on the border of Dagorlad. You should free the horses in Lang Rhuven.
Horses can be found in Lang Rhuven on the border of Dagorlad. You should free the horses in Lang Rhuven.
Freed the horses in Lang Rhuven.
You should return to Candúr, who can be found at a small Ranger outpost hidden in the Slag-hills.
